summary: Iteration 24 features fully tested. All new features working: 1) Admin Create User dialog with Name/Email/Password/Role fields and optional Partner dropdown. 2) Partner Editor with 'Partner-Nutzer' section showing user checkboxes for multi-user linking. 3) Backend returns linked_users array in GET /api/admin/partners. 4) partner_multiselection step type accepted by backend. 5) POST /api/partners/submit-multi creates submissions for multiple partners. 6) All dialogs have max-h and overflow-y-auto for proper scrolling.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 features complete: 1) CreateUserDialog in AdminDashboard.js allows admin to create users with optional partner assignment. 2) PartnerDialog has 'Partner-Nutzer' section with checkboxes - saving updates linked_user_ids and sets user roles to 'partner'. 3) partner_multiselection step type works like partner_selection but allows multiple selections via toggle. To test partner_multiselection end-to-end: admin creates step with type='partner_multiselection', user sees multi-select cards, confirm creates submissions to all selected partners. All dialogs have max-h and overflow-y-auto for proper scrolling within viewport.
